title: Reid Hoffman is leaving Microsoft’s board to go ‘founder mode’ with  startup Manus
snippet: After a very profitable decade on Microsoft's board, Reid Hoffman is stepping down to focus on his AI drug discovery startup Manus.

title: Founders share VC horror stories, and some are naming names
snippet: A massive viral conversation sharing VC horror stories has taken place this week on X. Some are weird. Some are infuriating.
